data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of confirming each checklist item with a timestamp. However, the evidence provided does not include any explicit confirmation of timestamps for all checklist items, only mentioning that a timestamp is recorded when the patient checks off 'watched video'. This indicates a gap in the requirement as it does not cover the confirmation for each item as required.
gaps: No evidence of confirmation with timestamp for each checklist item.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for timestamp confirmation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence or API responses that confirm each checklist item with a timestamp.
